forgot.title: Recover Access
forgot.subtitle: We'll send you an email to reset your password.
forgot.checkInbox: Check your inbox to reset your password.

errors.unauthorizedDomain: In Firebase Console → Authentication → Settings → Authorized domains, add localhost. Open the app at http://localhost:5175 (or the port Vite is using).
errors.operationNotAllowed: Enable Email/Password and Google in Firebase Console.
errors.tooManyRequests: Too many attempts. Try again later.
errors.popupBlocked: Pop-up was blocked. Allow pop-ups for this site.

firebase.emailInUse: An account with that email already exists.
firebase.weakPassword: Password is too weak (use at least 6 characters).
firebase.userNotFound: There is no account with that email.
firebase.tooManyRequests: Too many attempts. Try again later.
firebase.popupClosed: Google window was closed before completing.
firebase.popupBlocked: The browser blocked the pop-up. Try again — we use automatic redirection.
firebase.unauthorizedDomain: This domain is not authorized in Firebase. Add it under Authentication → Settings → Authorized domains.
firebase.operationNotAllowed: This sign-in method is not enabled in Firebase (check Authentication in the console).
firebase.configuration: Firebase is not properly configured in the project (check the VITE_FIREBASE_* variables).

errors.useAuthOutsideProvider: useAuth must be used inside AuthProvider

gate.firebaseMissingTitle: Firebase configuration is missing in the frontend
gate.firebaseMissingBody:
On local: copy the Firebase keys into dashboard-react/.env (VITE_FIREBASE_*).
On Vercel: Settings → Environment Variables → same variables → Redeploy (without redeploy the build won't have the API key).
